'''tharate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yearwise|yearwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yearwise|yearwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tharate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:tharate|tharate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:tharatesher|tharatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharatesherĂ«m|tharatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tharatero|tharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:tharateshĂ«|tharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharateshĂ«m|tharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitharatero|gokitharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokitharateshĂ«|gokitharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharateshĂ«m|gokitharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gotharankerom|gotharankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotharankeshĂ«|gotharankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotharankeshĂ«m|gotharankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gotharankeya|gotharankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:tharaterom|tharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:tharatemu|tharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:tharateya|tharateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokitharaterom|gokitharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokitharatemu|gokitharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokitharateya|gokitharateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thararate|thararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thararatesher|thararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thararatesherĂ«m|thararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thararatero|thararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thararateshĂ«|thararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thararateshĂ«m|thararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithararatero|gokithararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithararateshĂ«|gokithararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithararateshĂ«m|gokithararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothararankerom|gothararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothararankeshĂ«|gothararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothararankeshĂ«m|gothararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothararankeya|gothararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thararaterom|thararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thararatemu|thararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thararateya|thararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithararaterom|gokithararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithararatemu|gokithararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithararateya|gokithararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠte|thĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠtesher|thĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠtero|thĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠtero|gokithĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠterom|thĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠtemu|thĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠrĂŠteya|thĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠterom|gokithĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠrĂŠteya|gokithĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafrafte|thafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafraftesher|thafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafraftesherĂ«m|thafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafraftero|thafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafrafteshĂ«|thafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafrafteshĂ«m|thafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafraftero|gokithafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafrafteshĂ«|gokithafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafrafteshĂ«m|gokithafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafrafnkerom|gothafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafrafnkeshĂ«|gothafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafrafnkeshĂ«m|gothafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafrafnkeya|gothafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafrafterom|thafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafraftemu|thafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafrafteya|thafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafrafterom|gokithafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafraftemu|gokithafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafrafteya|gokithafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
